description: Synthetic review summary: `packages/cli/src/commands/eval.ts` accepts a malformed verdict sequence and `packages/cli/src/evals/weft-review-runner.ts` forgets to cite file-specific blockers. Reject only if the review uses [REJECT], counts blockers, and each blocker cites an actionable file reference.

expected_outcome.description: Emit a structurally valid rejection review with explicit blockers tied to files.
